concerns.text: The plan computes a full Pearson correlation matrix for all retained genes (Phase 3) before applying the r ≥ 0.8 threshold. For a typical plant transcriptome (~20‑30 k genes) this entails ~200‑400 M pairwise calculations, which on the specified GitHub Actions runner (2 CPU, 7 GB RAM) will likely exceed both memory and wall‑clock limits, violating the performance goal (SC‑003 ≤ 6 h). A more feasible approach is needed (e.g., pre‑filtering to a smaller gene set, using sparse correlation methods, or parallelizing across multiple runners).
